rows.finalText: A useful frame for "What is the next right step in my calling" is Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. Tower (19) in Past sets the tone with you may need stronger standards and boundaries. Tower colors your calling through distance, standards, official structure, and the part of the situation governed by rules rather than mood. Clover (2) in Present acts as the fulcrum, putting brief luck offers a manageable opening where the sequence can turn. Clover colors your calling through small improvements compound if acted on quickly, especially where luck, window, and ease have been building quietly. The likely direction shows in Future through Anchor (35), and it suggests durability and follow-through are rewarded once the pivot is met directly. Here Anchor becomes concrete through the version of vocation that can actually be sustained. Tower (19) and Anchor (35) reveal the deeper logic of the path, and it points to a blend of institution and stability, asking you to balance professionalism with connection while staying alert to staying anchored to obsolete goals.
